title: Keralis Create Modpack
description: Keralis Create is the official modpack from YouTuber Keralis, featuring the incredible Create mod and a handpicked selection of complementary mods. Designed for creativity, engineering, and stunning builds, this pack powers Keralis’s ongoing YouTube series
body: Keralis Create is the modpack from YouTuber Keralis, featuring the incredible Create mod and a handpicked selection of complementary mods. Designed for creativity, engineering, and stunning builds, this pack powers Keralis’s ongoing YouTube series — blending technical innovation with his signature cozy, builder-friendly style. Perfect for fans who want to play along and bring their own mechanical masterpieces to life.
